column2: The desired shape arrangement is achieved by shrinking/enlarging (instead of positioning) shapes

Matches all shapes on the slides to the first selected slide based on the shape name. This function is useful when you create a template, duplicate it multiple times and want to synchronize changes afterwards
Compensates for minimal edge shifts of the selected shapes by enlarging onto shapes to the left of the shapes to be adjusted.
Compensates for minimal edge shifts of the selected shapes by enlarging onto shapes to the upper-left of the shapes to be adjusted.

Inverts the current selection. All shapes (including placeholders) that were not previously selected are selected.
Save each slide as an individual file in the selected folder. The files are numbered with the slide number and named after the slide title.

Consolidates the selected open workbooks into a new workbook, i.e. copies all sheets into one workbook. The current workbook is not changed.
